entries.notes: Loaded nw-tdd-methodology, nw-quality-framework, nw-hexagonal-testing skills. Read Milestone7_StoryTestabilityTests.swift, Story.swift, InkEngine.swift, StoryState.swift. Baseline build clean. swift test confirmed RED state for walking skeleton and US-01 tests.

Confirmed 6/8 US-01 + walking skeleton tests RED (scaffold returns nil). 2 pass vacuously (nil==nil for unknown key, compile check). Failures are business-logic failures, not setup errors. Port-to-port: tests call story.getVariable() through Story driving port.

Created InkEngineGetVariableTests.swift. Test budget: 5 behaviors x 2 = 10 max, used 2 (1 parametrized for Int/Double/String/Bool bridging + 1 for absent key). Compilation fails with 'value of type InkEngine has no member getVariable' — correct RED reason.

Implemented InkEngine.getVariable bridging .int->Int, .float->Double, .string->String, .bool->Bool, absent/pointer->nil. Replaced Story.getVariable scaffold with engine.getVariable(name) delegation. Fixed pre-existing boolean classification bug in InkDecoder (JSON booleans were classified as .intValue(0/1) instead of .boolValue; fixed via CFBooleanGetTypeID check). Added NodeKind.boolValue case and TreeWalker dispatch. Fixed step loop to defer flush at /ev boundary when next node is VAR= (lookahead), so conditional assignments execute before buffered line is returned. All 10 target tests GREEN. No regressions in existing 192 tests; 18 pre-existing scaffold failures remain for US-02/US-03/US-04.

Committed as 1c12080: feat(story-testability): implement Story.getVariable with InkValue bridging. Step-ID: 01-01. Files: Story.swift, InkEngine.swift, InkDecoder.swift, NodeKind.swift, TreeWalker.swift, InkEngineGetVariableTests.swift (new), NodeKindTests.swift.

Loaded nw-tdd-methodology, nw-quality-framework, nw-hexagonal-testing skills. Read Story.swift (setVariable scaffold at line 110), InkEngine.swift (getVariable present, no setVariable), Milestone7_StoryTestabilityTests.swift (US-02 suite confirmed). Ran swift test --filter US02: 6 RED (assertion failures), 2 pass trivially (unknown-key no-op and canContinue guard). Baseline: 210 pre-existing tests + 10 US-01 tests all GREEN.

Confirmed 6/8 US-02 tests RED for business-logic reason: setVariable stub is no-op so writes don't persist; getVariable still returns initial values. 3 tests also fail because continueMaximally() scaffold returns empty string. Port-to-port: tests enter through Story.setVariable() and Story.getVariable() driving ports.

Created InkEngineSetVariableTests.swift. Test budget: 4 behaviors x 2 = 8 max, used 3 (1 parametrized for Int/Double/String bridging, 1 explicit Bool-before-Int check, 1 unknown-key no-op). Build fails with 'value of type InkEngine has no member setVariable' — correct RED reason.

Added InkEngine.setVariable: Bool check before Int, bridges Int->.int, Double->.float, Float->.float(Double), String->.string; pure no-op for unknown keys or unknown types. Replaced Story.setVariable scaffold with engine.setVariable(name, to: value) delegation. Also un-scaffolded Story.continueMaximally() (while-canContinue loop) — required to pass 3 US-02 tests that verify setVariable effects via story output. Post-GREEN wiring: both files_to_modify appear in git diff. All 8 US-02 tests GREEN; US-03 4 tests still RED; US-04 6 tests now GREEN (continueMaximally). Total: 213 tests, 4 failures (US-03 only).

Committed as 4013eab: feat(story-testability): implement Story.setVariable with InkValue bridging. Step-ID: 01-02. Files modified: InkEngine.swift, Story.swift. New file: InkEngineSetVariableTests.swift.

Loaded nw-tdd-methodology, nw-quality-framework, nw-hexagonal-testing skills. Read Story.swift (visitCount scaffold returns 0), InkEngine.swift (no visitCount/setVisitCount methods), StoryTestSupport.swift (setVisitCount no-op stub). Inspected slice-story-testability.ink.json: prologue knot has #f:1 (CountVisits), greeting uses CNT? prologue. Confirmed visitCounts key format is bare knot name 'prologue' (set in applyDivert via components.joined). Ran swift test: 213 tests, 4 issues (all US-03).

Confirmed 3 failing US-03 tests are RED for business-logic reasons: (1) visitCount returns 1 after natural execution — scaffold returns 0; (2) setVisitCount write is readable back — no-op stub + stub visitCount; (3) setVisitCount to 2 causes greeting to output welcome back line — 2 assertion failures. Port-to-port: tests call story.visitCount(forKnot:) and story.setVisitCount(forKnot:) through Story driving port and StoryTestSupport extension.

Created InkEngineVisitCountTests.swift. Test budget: 4 behaviors x 2 = 8 max, used 4 (B1: visitCount returns 0 for absent key; B2: visitCount returns stored count; B3: setVisitCount writes for knot in root.namedContent; B4: setVisitCount no-op for knot absent from root.namedContent). Build fails with 'value of type InkEngine has no member visitCount/setVisitCount' — correct RED reason.

Added InkEngine.visitCount(forKnot:)->Int: state.visitCounts[name] ?? 0. Added InkEngine.setVisitCount(forKnot:to:): guards on root.namedContent[name] != nil (not on visitCounts key presence — acceptance test requires write to succeed for unvisited but structurally-present knots); writes state.visitCounts[name] = count. Changed Story.engine from private to internal (needed for @testable import access in StoryTestSupport). Replaced Story.visitCount scaffold with engine.visitCount delegation. Replaced StoryTestSupport.setVisitCount stub with engine.setVisitCount delegation. Post-GREEN wiring: all 3 files_to_modify in git diff. All 217 tests GREEN (4 new unit + 213 pre-existing). Milestone7 suite: 29/29 GREEN. US-03: 7/7 GREEN.

Committed as 5446632: feat(story-testability): implement visitCount and setVisitCount. Step-ID: 01-03. Files modified: InkEngine.swift, Story.swift, StoryTestSupport.swift. New file: InkEngineVisitCountTests.swift.
